class.name: GodotREEditorStandalone
class.brief_description: Root control for the GDRE Tools standalone GUI.
class.description: [GodotREEditorStandalone] is the top-level [Control] node used by the GDRE Tools standalone application. It hosts the menus, dialogs, and log view, and exposes a handful of helpers that other parts of the GUI (or custom scripts running inside the standalone shell) can call to drive progress bars, show dialogs, and log messages. This class is only meaningful when GDRE is running as the standalone GUI; it has no effect in headless CLI mode.

method.name: get_version
method.description: Returns the GDRE Tools version string shown in the title bar and About dialog.

method.name: pck_select_request
method.description: Opens the PCK file-selection dialog pre-populated with the paths in [param path]. Used by the menu shortcuts that load a pack.

method.name: popup_confirm_box
method.description: Shows a modal confirmation dialog displaying [param message] under [param title]. [param confirm_callback] is invoked when the user presses the OK button and [param cancel_callback] is invoked on Cancel. Button labels can be overridden with [param ok_button_text] and [param cancel_button_text].

method.name: popup_error_box
method.description: Shows a modal error dialog displaying [param message] under [param title]. [param callback] is invoked when the dialog is dismissed.

method.name: progress_add_task
method.description: Registers a new long-running task with the standalone progress UI. [param task] is a unique identifier used by later calls to [method progress_task_step] and [method progress_end_task]. [param label] is the display text, [param steps] the total number of steps, and [param can_cancel] controls whether the UI shows a cancel button.

method.name: progress_end_task
method.description: Marks the task identified by [param task] as complete and removes it from the progress UI.

method.name: progress_task_step
method.description: Advances the task identified by [param task] to step [param step] and updates its state label to [param state]. Set [param force_refresh] to [code]true[/code] to force an immediate UI redraw (useful when the caller is blocking the main thread). Returns [code]true[/code] if the user has requested to cancel the task.

method.name: show_about_dialog
method.description: Shows the About dialog, containing the GDRE version, license disclaimer, and system info.

method.name: tree_set_edit_checkbox_cell_only_when_checkbox_is_pressed
method.description: Toggles a workaround on the given [Tree] that constrains editable-checkbox cells to only react to clicks on the checkbox itself, rather than anywhere in the cell.

method.name: write_log_message
method.description: Appends [param message] to the standalone log view.
